dimensions.evidence: Plan context states 'There is no such helper today' — the getAttrDef function was explicitly absent when the plan was written; no file changes were made to add it, and no concrete file/symbol citation is possible.
Cannot cite any specific existing file, symbol, or test — the function, its export, and its unit tests (tags.ts + tags.test.ts) are all absent per the plan's own description of current state.
All four acceptance criteria remain unimplemented: getAttrDef export, case-insensitive tag+attr lookup, undefined return paths, and vitest unit tests in tags.test.ts — none exist per plan context.

failureReasons: The approved plan context explicitly states 'There is no such helper today' for getAttrDef in tags.ts. No file changes were made in the final build round. Without access to the codebase showing the function now exists, and with the plan's own admission it was absent, the claim of 'already satisfied' cannot be confirmed.
